title: clypeola auriculata
intro: Clypeola auriculata, also known as the earleaved clypeola or hairy clypeola, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of clypeola auriculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and cold symptoms, and even exhibit antioxidant activity. In traditional herbal preparations, clypeola auriculata is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or dried herb infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
